recentTweets.text:
RT @SenSchumer: They are losing, and they know it.

Election officials will not be intimidated. Senate Democrats will make sure resources a…

It’s been six years since we lost my friend, colleague, mentor, and our hero John Lewis.

Throughout his extraordinary life, he showed us that - even in our darkest moments - we can fight for what is right AND spread joy and light.

We miss you, John! https://t.co/3v0cHojGbG

We should all be paying attention. The president is actively attacking the integrity of our elections to try and justify his voter suppression efforts.

Here's the truth: the 2020 election was free and fair.

Now, we need to stay vigilant to make sure the 2026 elections are too.
RT @SenateDems: No.
RT @ReverendWarnock: This is not about 2020. It’s about 2026. https://t.co/UzHMtfEisE
RT @SenAlexPadilla: Let me lay out the facts: Donald Trump lost the 2020 election. Period. Despite his false claims, there is no evidence o…
RT @SenatorBaldwin: Today, I’m happy to join mayors, crisis workers, and advocates from across Wisconsin in celebrating four years of the 9…

Trump doesn't have the votes to pass his deeply unpopular agenda, so he's going to use a primetime address from the White House to spread lies and conspiracies about the 2020 election.

Our elections are safe and secure.

No matter how hard he tries, Trump can't rewrite history.

This week I questioned Dr. Schwartz, Trump’s nominee to lead the CDC, and I’m concerned.

Not because she’s not qualified— she is. 

But because this administration has shown a pattern of undermining the independence of qualified leaders and our public health demands better. https://t.co/LOdFHe6Noh

The Attorney General is supposed to be a lawyer for the American people, not the President.

And when it comes to holding this President accountable to the law, even acting AG Blanche will tell you: he's Trump's lawyer.

This is unacceptable. We must stop this chaos.

This week, ICE shot and killed two more people in the streets — people who weren't even subjects of investigation — and Republicans want to give them MORE money?

Enough. I won't support it.
Families shouldn’t have to skip meals just to cover their healthcare costs, but because of President Trump’s cuts and skyrocketing premiums, that's a reality for far too many Americans.

President Trump said the war was over, but a month later the fighting continues and costs keep rising.

This is a war that never should have started, and it's time for this administration to listen to the American people and end it.

The President may think historic legislation isn't worth his time or attention, but despite his inaction the ROAD to Housing package is now law.

Everyone should have a safe, affordable place to call home.

RT @SenWarren: Our bipartisan housing bill is now the law.

For every family where the American Dream of owning your own home feels like it…
I’m saddened to hear of the unexpected passing of my colleague, Senator Lindsey Graham. Sending prayers to his family, loved ones, and constituents in South Carolina as they mourn his loss.

The Trump admin wants to alter American history to follow to his agenda. 

The Smithsonian museums should be a place for us to learn about all our history, the good and the bad.

Wishing a very happy birthday to the heart of our family!

Here's to the woman who taught us the importance of staying grounded while reaching for the stars.

Love you, Mom! https://t.co/lCe52apRc5
The recent heatwave is just another reminder that we need to invest in protecting and restoring our planet before it’s too late.
For an Administration committed to "Making America Healthy Again," they're taking every opportunity to cut science-based efforts to keep our communities safe.

During his time as President, Trump has made billions off crypto and stocks.

He's filling his pockets while millions of Americans struggle to pay for healthcare and housing.
Happy 4th of July, Delaware! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/lVK4909Cro
RT @SenatorLujan: President Trump’s attempt to end birthright citizenship was unlawful and unconstitutional. The Supreme Court rejected tha…

RT @SenatorAndyKim: And today, the Supreme Court said that no president can.

The Constitution says, if you're born in America, you're an A…

Independent agencies exist so the American people can have faith that decisions being made about their lives are in their best interest - no one else’s.

This decision sets a dangerous new precedent for the future of our nation.
RT @SenGaryPeters: I’m glad the Supreme Court affirmed that ballots mailed by election day will still be counted. Millions of Americans rel…

Our democracy works best when everyone has the opportunity to make their voice heard.

This is a win for voters across the country.
Tearing down the people's house and building a stage for the UFC to make money is a perfect visual for this administration's priorities. https://t.co/Kpom5Vlc3Q
https://t.co/5zjMYtEDWt

They lied and told us it wasn't a war. Then, they lied and said it was over.

Now, they want us to spend $80 BILLION of your money on the war they never should have started.

Trump can try to put a speed bump on the ROAD to Housing, but he won't stop this from becoming law. https://t.co/oA2k2hY55G

World Vitiligo Day is an opportunity to raise awareness of the condition, support research, and dispel stigma.
 
Let us uplift and encourage those living with vitiligo to live https://t.co/ip64PQUznJ

This decision not only threatens the safety of our Haitian neighbors but the strength and stability of communities across the country.

It contradicts the values on which our nation was founded and undermines our efforts to respond to the Humanitarian crises facing Haiti.

He doesn’t ca…

The President is stalling legislation that would bring down housing costs, all to try and force us to pass his voter suppression bill.
 
It's never been clearer that this administration doesn't care about us— do your job, Mr. President, it's time to get this done. https://t.co/ajvUC0Of4L

Good news: the ROAD to Housing Act just took a big step forward!

This historic package will free up billions for affordable housing, stop private equity from buying up single-family homes, and save both time and money.

You asked, we took action. Now, let's finish this!

Congress has spoken.

The people have spoken.

It's time for the Trump administration to end this war they never should have started in the first place.
It doesn't happen often, but... I agree with @RepThomasMassie
RT @BPC_Bipartisan: “We see the American people, we see what they’re going through right now. We’re a group of people who understand that w…
RT @SenatorBaldwin: Instead of spending billions on a ballroom and useless vanity projects in D.C., we should be making life easier for Wis…

RT @SenDuckworth: NEWS: The Senate just passed the biggest housing bill in 30 years!

With the median age of first-time homebuyers at a rec…

I'm headed to the floor to pass the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act to get Congress off the sidelines and take on the housing crisis headfirst.

It's time bring safe, affordable housing back within reach for American families. https://t.co/R7ryPrNc67

For many Americans, homeownership has felt out of reach, but the ROAD to Housing Act will help them make that dream a reality.

Let's get it passed.

Republicans in Washington are forcing children to go hungry while they make you pay for Trump’s reckless war and a gold-plated ballroom.

It's unacceptable.

Juneteenth honors the day millions of Black Americans were freed from slavery.

Today, we reflect on the progress we’ve made and look forward to the work we have yet to do. https://t.co/cBj84I05Iw

It’s clear that we have a problem on our hands.

Senate democrats are working on policies to lower healthcare costs, but Washington Republicans need to come to the table.

Trump promised the ballroom wouldn’t cost taxpayers a dime.

That was a lie.

He doesn’t care that families are struggling to pay for housing, groceries, and gas if it means he gets his ballroom.
RT @SenatorLujan: Under Trump, the average household in New Mexico has had to spend $2,500+ more to feed their family, keep a roof over the…

This administration keeps the chaos swirling as they fight with their own party about who should have what job.

Putting egos and personal payoffs over our national security makes us all less safe.

My prayers are with the victims of this senseless act of gun violence. I'm grateful for the swift law enforcement response.

Delawareans deserve to feel safe in their community, especially in a place of healing like ChristianaCare. We must come together in this painful moment.

I have been briefed on the reported shooting at Wilmington Hospital.

As we wait for further information, I’m praying for our community and grateful for the swift and ongoing law enforcement response.

America has a housing crisis, and we need to work to make sure everyone has a safe, affordable place to call home.

The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act would do just that.

By cutting red tape, we can lower costs for our communities.
RT @SenWarren: The historic 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act will address our nation’s housing crisis by boosting housing supply, bringing…

No one should have to question how they’ll afford the care they need.

It's time for Republicans to come to the table and find bipartisan ways to rein in out-of-control healthcare costs.

DACA was created to help children of immigrants build a life in the only country they’ve ever known. 14 years later, and the attacks on their safety and stability persist.

To all the Dreamers, know that you belong here and we’ll never stop fighting for you.

RT @PattyMurray: Republicans CHOSE to let the ACA tax credits expire.

Republicans CHOSE to drive up costs and force families to drop insur…

I think we have a different understanding of what “achieving the impossible” looks like.

So proud of the way our state is working to make second chances possible for Delawareans.

After seeing a dad put back grapes because they were too expensive, I was inspired to try and make things better for families across Delaware.

That's what government exists to do: make life easier - not harder - for people. This is a sign Trump's leadership is failing us.

Delaware — it’s official.
